name: backport-pr
tagline: Backports a merged Next.js PR from canary to an older release branch by cherry-picking and opening a draft PR.
verdict: Solid, deterministic git/PR workflow with good failure handling (empty cherry-pick, missing merge commit fallback) and re-run safety. Weak spots: no explicit out-of-scope guidance, gh/pnpm used without declaring them as requirements, and no version or changelog signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope text anywhere; Related Skills section names adjacent skills but doesn't state exclusions.
gh (GitHub CLI) and pnpm are invoked repeatedly (e.g. 'gh pr view ...') with no requirements section or availability check.
No version field, changelog, or dated revision notes anywhere in frontmatter or body.
